## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest` after installing test extras, or `uv run --extra test pytest`.
- [ ] I ran `mfigci --help` or the relevant CLI command.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not add private datasets, local paths, emails, tokens, or unclear
      third-party materials.
- [ ] I kept MATLAB rendering optional unless the change explicitly concerns
      `mfigci render`.

## Notes for reviewers

Mention any compatibility concerns, report format changes, or follow-up issues.
